title: Offer
description: Connect with people around you by offering them drinks, snacks, or other items at local businesses. Break the ice, discover new places, and make real connections.

title: DietPal
description: AI-powered diet app that personalizes your plan based on your needs and lifestyle. Track food, exercise, and well-being — then get actionable insights to hit your goals.

title: Pixvibe
description: Outstanding AI-powered photo editing: erase objects, cut subjects, swap backgrounds, and generate AI images. Built for Pixvibe's mobile and web platforms.

title: Collagevibe
description: Generate and customize photos as collages with ease. Edit, arrange, and personalize your pictures exactly how you want. Developed for Collagevibe's mobile platform.

title: FitVibe
description: AI-powered wardrobe app. Add clothes with automatic background removal, build outfits with AI, get personalized style recommendations, discover what's missing from your wardrobe, and virtually try on looks.

title: intyx.ai
description: Transform your data into instant dashboards. Upload a CSV and AI creates beautiful, interactive charts in seconds — no coding required. Early access is open.

title: dynamic.intyx.ai
description: Update your app's content in real time without shipping a new build. Drop one Flutter component; the AI decision layer picks the right content for each user.
